steps.title: Track the public's view
steps.content: The passage says filmmakers wanted the public to embrace film and used critics who compared film with traditional art forms. Those critics could legitimize film by shaping how the public understood cinema.

steps.title: Reject action-based nouns
steps.content: Choice A would mean the public copied cinema. Choice B would mean the public added something to cinema. Choice C would mean the public applied something to cinema. None of these captures influence on opinion. The answer is D.
